parameters.content:
## Interview Question Generator

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set INTERVIEW_EMAIL_TO
3. Provide research goal, participant profile, and topic areas
4. LLM generates structured interview guide
5. Approval gate before guide is shared with research team

parameters.jsCode:
const { guide: g, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const sectionLines = (g.sections||[]).map(s => [
  `SECTION: ${s.section_title} (~${s.estimated_time_minutes} min) — ${s.section_goal}`,
  ...(s.questions||[]).map(q =>
    `  Q [${q.type}]: ${q.question}${(q.probes||[]).length ? '\n  Probes:\n'+q.probes.map(p=>'    - '+p).join('\n') : ''}`
  ),
  ''
].join('\n')).join('\n');
const report = [
  `INTERVIEW GUIDE: ${g.interview_title}`,
  `Estimated duration: ${g.estimated_duration_minutes} min`,
  `Research goal: ${m.research_goal}`,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  `SCREENER QUESTIONS:`,
  (g.screener_questions||[]).map((q,i)=>`  ${i+1}. ${q}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `WARM-UP:`,
  (g.warm_up_questions||[]).map((q,i)=>`  ${i+1}. ${q}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  sectionLines,
  `CLOSING QUESTIONS:`,
  (g.closing_questions||[]).map((q,i)=>`  ${i+1}. ${q}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `DO NOT ASK:`,
  (g.do_not_ask||[]).map(d=>`  - ${d}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK: ${g.analysis_framework}`,
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Interview Guide — {{ $json.guide.interview_title }}
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and share with research team | Reject
